languages.text: "В мою инфо-разметку занесен лишь капитан блюстителей Изимонд Зауэрбэк. Он отмечен благословением фамильного плазменного пистолета. Прочие орудия используются вне системы дворца".
"The only one in my data-index is the enforcer captain Isimond Sauerback. He has been honoured with the blessing of a dynasty plasma pistol. Other weapons are used outside the palace system."
languages.original_text: "В мою инфо-разметку занесен лишь капитан блюстителей Изимонд Зауэрбэк. Он отмечен благословением фамильного плазменного пистолета. Прочие орудия используются вне системы дворца".

traits.locale_text: "The only one in my data-index is the enforcer captain Isimond Sauerback. He has been honoured with the blessing of a dynasty plasma pistol. Other weapons are used outside the palace system."
"The only one in my data-index is the enforcer captain Isimond Sauerback. He has been honoured with the blessing of a dynasty plasma pistol. Other weapons are used outside the palace system."
"The only one in my data-index is the enforcer captain Isimond Sauerback. He has been honoured with the blessing of a dynasty plasma pistol. Other weapons are used outside the palace system."

languages.text: “在我的数据索引中，唯一符合条件的是执法者上尉伊西蒙德·苏尔贝克。他被赐予了一把王朝的等离子手枪。其他武器只能在宫殿外围区域使用。”
languages.original_text: "The only one in my data-index is the enforcer captain Isimond Sauerback. He has been honoured with the blessing of a dynasty plasma pistol. Other weapons are used outside the palace system."

traits.locale_text: “在我的数据索引中，唯一符合条件的是执法者上尉伊西蒙德·苏尔贝克。他被赐予了一把王朝的等离子手枪。其他武器只能在宫殿外围区域使用。”

languages.text: « Mon index de données ne liste qu'une seule personne répondant à ce critère : Isimond Sauerback, le capitaine des prévôts. On lui a fait l'honneur de lui conférer la bénédiction d'un pistolet à plasma dynastique. D'autres armes sont utilisées en dehors du système palatial. »
languages.original_text: "The only one in my data-index is the enforcer captain Isimond Sauerback. He has been honoured with the blessing of a dynasty plasma pistol. Other weapons are used outside the palace system."

traits.locale_text: « Mon index de données ne liste qu'une seule personne répondant à ce critère : Isimond Sauerback, le capitaine des prévôts. On lui a fait l'honneur de lui conférer la bénédiction d'un pistolet à plasma dynastique. D'autres armes sont utilisées en dehors du système palatial. »

languages.text: "Veri dizinimde yer alan tek isim, infazcı kaptan İsimond Sauerback. Hanedanlık, plazma tabancasının lütfuyla onurlandırılmıştır. Diğer silahlar, saray sisteminin dışında kullanılmaktadır."
languages.original_text: "The only one in my data-index is the enforcer captain Isimond Sauerback. He has been honoured with the blessing of a dynasty plasma pistol. Other weapons are used outside the palace system."

traits.locale_text: "Veri dizinimde yer alan tek isim, infazcı kaptan İsimond Sauerback. Hanedanlık, plazma tabancasının lütfuyla onurlandırılmıştır. Diğer silahlar, saray sisteminin dışında kullanılmaktadır."

languages.text: «El único en mi índice de datos es el capitán de seguridad, Isimond Sauerback. Se le ha honrado con la bendición de una pistola de plasma de la dinastía. Fuera del sistema del palacio, se utilizan otras armas».
languages.original_text: "The only one in my data-index is the enforcer captain Isimond Sauerback. He has been honoured with the blessing of a dynasty plasma pistol. Other weapons are used outside the palace system."

traits.locale_text: «El único en mi índice de datos es el capitán de seguridad, Isimond Sauerback. Se le ha honrado con la bendición de una pistola de plasma de la dinastía. Fuera del sistema del palacio, se utilizan otras armas».

languages.text: "Laut Datenindex kommt nur eine Person infrage. Enforcer-Captain Isimond Sauerback. Er wurde von der Dynastie mit einer Plasmapistole geehrt. Außerhalb des Palastsystems kommen andere Waffen zum Einsatz."
languages.original_text: "The only one in my data-index is the enforcer captain Isimond Sauerback. He has been honoured with the blessing of a dynasty plasma pistol. Other weapons are used outside the palace system."

traits.locale_text: "Laut Datenindex kommt nur eine Person infrage. Enforcer-Captain Isimond Sauerback. Er wurde von der Dynastie mit einer Plasmapistole geehrt. Außerhalb des Palastsystems kommen andere Waffen zum Einsatz."

languages.text: 「私のデータ・インデックスには、唯一、強制執行隊長イシモンド・ザウアーバックが登録されています。彼は王朝式プラズマ銃の祝福を受けています。他の武器は宮殿システムの外で使用されます。」
languages.original_text: "The only one in my data-index is the enforcer captain Isimond Sauerback. He has been honoured with the blessing of a dynasty plasma pistol. Other weapons are used outside the palace system."

traits.locale_text: 「私のデータ・インデックスには、唯一、強制執行隊長イシモンド・ザウアーバックが登録されています。彼は王朝式プラズマ銃の祝福を受けています。他の武器は宮殿システムの外で使用されます。」
